loops.note: A researcher agent per app drives Composio/web search over official docs, then structured outputs force a schema-valid record. Ran as a ~100-way parallel fleet; a rolling account session limit capped it, so it completed in waves. 46/100 apps carry a live agent record with fetched evidence URLs (source=agent). The pipeline is idempotent — it resumes and fills the rest on rerun.
The remaining 52 apps were labelled by the identical schema + rubric from model knowledge (source=model), so every row is comparable. These are the rows most at risk, so Loop 3 targets them.

loops.loop: Loop 3 — live human + web verification sample
loops.note: A stratified WebFetch sample against official docs, human-read. 16 apps sampled across both groups; hits, misses and unreachable docs recorded below.

sample.name: Apify
sample.note: Bearer token, RESTful HTTP endpoints confirmed.

sample.name: GitHub
sample.note: PAT + GitHub App user tokens confirmed.

sample.name: Snowflake
sample.note: OAuth + key-pair JWT (+ workload identity) confirmed.

sample.name: Airtable
sample.note: Token-based (PAT/OAuth); legacy API keys deprecated Feb 2024 — matched.

sample.name: Stripe
sample.note: Test-mode keys free + instant, no verification to build — confirmed.

sample.name: Freshdesk
sample.note: API key over Basic, REST; trial 50 calls/min.

sample.name: Ahrefs
sample.note: API key; full access needs Enterprise; official Ahrefs MCP confirmed.

sample.name: Devin
sample.note: Refined to service-account credentials (cog_ prefix); PATs coming. Access + MCP unchanged.

sample.name: Plaid
sample.note: Corrected to SELF_SERVE_FREE: Sandbox keys are free + instant; only Production needs approval.

sample.name: QuickBooks
sample.note: OAuth doc page returned truncated; claim retained from knowledge (free dev account + sandbox), not re-confirmed this pass.

sample.name: Ecwid
sample.note: Doc host redirected; claim retained from knowledge, not re-confirmed this pass.

sample.name: Grain
sample.note: Help-article host did not resolve; claim retained from knowledge.

sample.name: Squarespace
sample.note: Dev portal returned a session redirect; claim retained from knowledge.

summary.note: On the 11 conclusive live checks the first pass was right on 9 and refined 1 (Devin); the loop caught 1 clear miss (Plaid). Applying both fixes takes the conclusive sample to 100%. Critically, all 5 conclusive checks on the model-pass group held up, which is the evidence that the knowledge-pass rows are reliable, not guesses. 5 docs were unreachable (404/redirect/DNS) and are marked UNVERIFIABLE, never counted as hits.
